heading: Solutions built for scientific & clinical impact
lead: Scalable, responsible AI tailored to the complex demands of healthcare, biotech, pharma, and research — from raw data to actionable insight.

items.title: Precision Medicine AI
items.description: Personalized models that translate genomic and clinical data into life-changing, patient-specific decisions.

items.title: Bioinformatics & Genomics
items.description: Advanced pipelines for sequencing analysis, variant discovery, and computational biology at scale.

items.title: Generative & Agentic AI
items.description: LLM, RAG, and autonomous agent systems that reason over complex scientific and enterprise data.

items.title: Healthcare Interoperability
items.description: HL7-driven integration that connects systems, streamlines workflows, and improves patient outcomes.

items.title: Data Engineering
items.description: Robust, scalable data infrastructure that powers reliable analytics and production ML.

items.title: Machine & Deep Learning
items.description: Predictive and diagnostic models engineered for accuracy, transparency, and real-world deployment.
